note: v0.7 performance measurements. Compares against phase-2-baseline.json. Hot-key optimization reduces cold-start from ~50us to single GET. Secondary indexes eliminate full MVCC scans for snapshot-scoped lookups.

hot_key_cold_start.description: Persist current snapshot ID and per-table file counts under a single system key
hot_key_cold_start.impact: Cold-start read reduced from full counter scan to single GET (12us p50 vs 50us baseline)

secondary_indexes.description: Skip-index for snapshot-scoped data file lookups
secondary_indexes.impact: Eliminates MVCC filter scan for finding files added at a specific snapshot
secondary_indexes.threshold: Added when MVCC filter overhead exceeds 10x amplification

metadata_packing.description: Store all per-table metadata as one composite value
metadata_packing.impact: describe_table reduced from multiple prefix scans to single point read (12us vs 35us)

slatedb_tuning.description: Configurable block size, bloom filters, L0 threshold, compaction
